$comment: DM-2: the producerâ†”consumer field contract for a lexical item. The producer is the Python content pipeline (python/src/wikain/pipeline/types.py); the consumer is the TS runtime (src/domain/lexicalItem.ts). Both assert against this file, so a field added on one side without the other fails a test rather than silently half-shipping. It replaces the TS-to-TS assignability check that was possible when the pipeline was TypeScript â€” and unlike that check, it catches drift in either direction.

producerOnly.$comment: Emitted by the pipeline, deliberately NOT part of the runtime type. `_flags` records why the generator left a field null (Â§7.3 flag-don't-fix); it is a build-time audit annotation, and the runtime just tolerates the null it explains.
